arts.ttl: Lionel Messi 'could pull out of the coldest MLS match EVER' as Inter Miami prepare to face rivals in freezing -15C conditions
arts.sum: Weather reports ahead of their CONCACAF Champions Cup opener on Tuesday night suggest that temperatures will drop as low as -15C (5 degrees Fahrenheit).
